text.title: A11y No-Regression PR Gate Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply A11y No-Regression PR Gate end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: snapshot-baseline
step.action: Write current violations to .a11y/baseline.json; commit via PR.
step.decision-gate: Reject baseline edited from feature branch.

step.name: wire-diff-route-mapping
step.action: Compute changed files -> impacted routes / stories.
step.decision-gate: Reject if mapping returns full-site for tiny diff.

step.name: run-scoped-scan
step.action: Scan only impacted routes; emit violation set.

step.name: diff-vs-baseline
step.action: Compute NEW vs FIXED; apply severity policy.
step.decision-gate: Reject pass when new critical/serious present.

step.name: waiver-and-ack
step.action: Honour matching waivers (not expired); honour ack-line for moderate/minor.
